SET box TO $'''C:\\Users\\gotshota\\Downloads'''
SET 環境 TO $'''fsio365'''
SET 退避先 TO $'''sites/OJT-gotou/TaihiDocument'''
SET ページタイﾄル TO $'''OJT-後藤T'''
SET 退避先ドキュメントライブラリ TO $'''TaihiDocument'''
SET 退避移動 TO $'''%ページタイﾄル% - %退避先ドキュメントライブラリ%'''
SET 退避 TO 1
Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: $'''%box%\\PAD.xlsx''' Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> ExcelInstance
Excel.ReadFromExcel.ReadAllCells Instance: ExcelInstance GetCellContentsMode: Excel.GetCellContentsMode.TypedValues FirstLineIsHeader: False RangeValue=> ExcelData
Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: ExcelInstance
Variables.AddColumnToDataTable.AppendColumnToDataTable DataTable: ExcelData ColumnName: $'''連番'''
SET a TO 0
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem7 IN ExcelData
Variables.ModifyDataTableItem DataTable: ExcelData ColumnNameOrIndex: $'''連番''' RowIndex: a Value: a
Variables.IncreaseVariable Value: a IncrementValue: 1
END
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem IN ExcelData
Variables.AddItemToList Item: CurrentItem['Column2'] List: パス
END
Variables.RemoveDuplicateItemsFromList List: パス IgnoreCase: False
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem2 IN パス[1:]
SET 退避Text TO $'''Taihi%退避%'''
Folder.Create FolderPath: box FolderName: 退避Text Folder=> NewFolder
Folder.Create FolderPath: box FolderName: $'''%退避Text%_next''' Folder=> NewFolder2
WAIT 3
Variables.FilterDataTable DataTable: ExcelData FilterParameters: { ^['RULE', 'COLUMN', 'OPERATOR', 'VALUE'], [$'''''', $'''Column2''', $'''Equal''', CurrentItem2] } MatchCase: True FilteredDataTable=> FilteredDataTable
WAIT 3
IF FilteredDataTable.RowsCount > 0 THEN
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem3 IN FilteredDataTable
WAIT 5
WebAutomation.LaunchChrome.LaunchChromeNoWait Url: $'''https://%環境%.sharepoint.com/%CurrentItem3['Column2']%/%CurrentItem3['Column1']%''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Maximized ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"ローカル コンピューター\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
WAIT 6
WebAutomation.CloseWebBrowser BrowserInstance: Browser
System.RunApplication.RunApplication ApplicationPath: $'''explorer.exe''' CommandLineArguments: box WindowStyle: System.ProcessWindowStyle.Maximized ProcessId=> AppProcessId
WAIT 10
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Space}''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'ダウンロード - エクスプローラー\'']['Button \'切り取り\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'ダウンロード - エクスプローラー\'']['Edit \'名前\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.DoubleClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'youtube_powerplatform-main - エクスプローラー\'']['List \'項目ビュー\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.DoubleClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Control}({V})''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
WAIT 3
UIAutomation.CloseWindow.CloseByTitleClass Title: $'''%退避Text% - エクスプローラー''' Class: $'''CabinetWClass'''
END
END
Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''%box%\\%退避Text%''' FileFilter: $'''*.xls''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files_xls
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem_xls IN Files_xls
Excel.LaunchExcel.LaunchAndOpenUnderExistingProcess Path: CurrentItem_xls Visible: True ReadOnly: False UseMachineLocale: False Instance=> ExcelInstance
UIAutomation.FocusWindow.FocusByInstanceOrHandle WindowInstance: ExcelInstance
Excel.SaveExcel.SaveAs Instance: ExcelInstance DocumentFormat: Excel.ExcelFormat.OpenXmlWorkbook DocumentPath: $'''%CurrentItem_xls.Directory%_next\\%CurrentItem_xls.NameWithoutExtension%.xlsx'''
WAIT 3
Excel.CloseExcel.Close Instance: ExcelInstance
END
Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''%box%\\%退避Text%''' FileFilter: $'''*.ppt''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files_ppt
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem_ppt IN Files_ppt
System.RunApplication.RunApplicationAndWaitToLoad ApplicationPath: CurrentItem_ppt.FullName WindowStyle: System.ProcessWindowStyle.Maximized Timeout: 0 ProcessId=> AppProcessId
UIAutomation.GetElementDetails Element: appmask['Window \'ppt_test1.ppt - 保護ビュー - PowerPoint\'']['Button \'編集を有効にする(E)\''] AttributeName: $'''Exists''' BringToFront: True AttributeValue=> AttributeValue
IF AttributeValue = $'''true''' THEN
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'ppt_test1.ppt - 保護ビュー - PowerPoint\'']['Button \'編集を有効にする(E)\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
WAIT 10
END
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Alt}(F)''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
MouseAndKeyboard.MoveMouse X: 0 Y: 0 RelativeTo: MouseAndKeyboard.PositionRelativeTo.Screen MovementStyle: MouseAndKeyboard.MovementStyle.Instant
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''(A)''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
WAIT 3
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'ppt_test2.ppt - 互換モード - PowerPoint\'']['Combo Box \'ファイルの種類\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Down}''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Enter}''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
WAIT 5
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'1.ppt - 互換モード - PowerPoint\'']['Button \'ダウンロード ‎> ... ary_1_next\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'1_1_1(honban).pptx - PowerPoint\'']['Button \'前の場所\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.DoubleClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
WAIT 2
Clipboard.SetText Text: NewFolder2.FullName
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Control}({V})''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 30 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: $'''{Enter}''' DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
WAIT 2
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'1.ppt - 互換モード - PowerPoint\' 3']['Button \'保存(S)\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
WAIT 6
UIAutomation.Click.Click Element: appmask['Window \'PowerPoint\'']['Button \'閉じる\''] ClickType: UIAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MousePositionRelativeToElement: UIAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0
END
Folder.GetFiles Folder: $'''%box%\\%退避Text%''' FileFilter: $'''*.doc''' IncludeSubfolders: False FailOnAccessDenied: True SortBy1: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending1: False SortBy2: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending2: False SortBy3: Folder.SortBy.NoSort SortDescending3: False Files=> Files_doc
LOOP FOREACH CurrentItem_doc IN Files_doc
Word.LaunchWord.LaunchAndOpen Path: CurrentItem_doc Visible: True ReadOnly: False Instance=> WordInstance
UIAutomation.FocusWindow.FocusByInstanceOrHandle WindowInstance: WordInstance
WAIT 3
Word.CloseWord.CloseAndSaveAs Instance: WordInstance DocumentFormat: Word.WordFormat.DOCX DocumentPath: $'''%CurrentItem_doc.Directory%_next\\%CurrentItem_doc.NameWithoutExtension%.docx'''
END
WAIT 4
WebAutomation.LaunchChrome.LaunchChrome Url: $'''https://%環境%.sharepoint.com/%退避先%''' WindowState: WebAutomation.BrowserWindowState.Maximized ClearCache: False ClearCookies: False WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 Timeout: 60 PiPUserDataFolderMode: WebAutomation.PiPUserDataFolderModeEnum.AutomaticProfile TargetDesktop: $'''{\"DisplayName\":\"ローカル コンピューター\",\"Route\":{\"ServerType\":\"Local\",\"ServerAddress\":\"\"},\"DesktopType\":\"local\"}''' BrowserInstance=> Browser
WAIT 3
WebAutomation.GetDetailsOfElement BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ems%2Easpx\' 2']['Span \'作成またはアップロード\' 2'] AttributeName: $'''Exists''' AttributeValue=> AttributeValue5
IF AttributeValue5 = $'''true''' THEN
WebAutomation.Click.Click BrowserInstance: Browser Control: appmask['Web Page \'h ... ems%2Easpx\'']['Span \'作成またはアップロード\''] ClickType: WebAutomation.ClickType.LeftClick MouseClick: True WaitForPageToLoadTimeout: 60 MousePositionRelativeToElement: WebAutomation.RectangleEdgePoint.MiddleCenter OffsetX: 0 OffsetY: 0

WAIT 3
MouseAndKeyboard.SendKeys.FocusAndSendKeys TextToSend: 退避Text DelayBetweenKeystrokes: 10 SendTextAsHardwareKeys: False
WAIT 1

WAIT 5

# [ControlRepository][PowerAutomateDesktop]

{
